title: Premium Clinical Skincare Brand — Product-Shot Finishing, Logo Vectorization, Per-SKU Label Merge & Print-Ready Packaging Export
one_line_ask: Take our raw skincare hero shot, flat logo mark, texture plate and SKU copy sheet and produce a clinically clean white-background product image set, an editable vector logo, a recommended type system, a packaging-safe wide landscape reframe of the hero (cropped from the pure-white-sweep master), a clinical monochrome variant, per-SKU print labels merged from our label template, and a print-ready packaging PDF — all assembled on one presentation board.

issues: Softbox/reflector sliver visible top-left as specified but slightly more prominent than ideal
Faint yellow-green color cast present and correct
Tilt appears to be approximately 3-4 degrees as specified
Dust specks and lint thread subtle but present
Shadow pooling at base is soft and realistic
Glass refraction and frosted texture render convincingly photographic rather than CGI
Pump cap matte white and correctly rendered
Near-white sweep background with slight warm tone — correct
Very minor: the benzene ring glyph inside the droplet has slightly uneven line weights at small size, but acceptable for a raster source file intended for vectorization
The droplet/triangle upper portion merges slightly with the molecule arms at the junction points, which a designer will need to clean up during vectorization — expected and acceptable
Near-perfect single ink color consistency throughout; no gradients or shadows detected
Texture is slightly uniform and could be mistaken for a generator output, but this is acceptable per brief
Very subtle speckle—could be slightly more pronounced for realism, but within spec
No major photographic flaws or AI artifacts detected
Resolution appears to be approximately 1024x1024px rather than the specified 4000x2500px — client will need to confirm source file dimensions before use
Very slight luminance vignetting toward edges (acceptable per brief, designer to correct if needed)
Aggregate speckle is marginally coarser than 'very fine' spec in a few clusters, though within acceptable range for a source plate

assets.name: label.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
